arts.ttl: Man Utd hold key advantage in five-way battle for Liam Delap and begin transfer talks
arts.sum: Liam Delap is said to have a release clause in his contract if Ipswich Town are relegated from the Premier League and Manchester United are among five clubs targeting the striker

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest v Manchester United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Live scores | Read Football Daily | And email Scott Forest make one change to their starting XI following their FA Cup quarter-final win at Brighton last weekend. Anthony Elanga, formerly of United, comes in for Nicolás Domínguez, who drops to the bench. Leading scorer Chris Wood is still sidelined with a hip problem, while Callum Hudson-Odoi is also missing this evening. United make four changes after their 3-0 Premier League win at Leicester 16 days ago. Leny Yoro, Casemiro, Patrick Dorgu and Joshua Zirkzee are in; Victor Lindelöf, Christian Eriksen and Rasmus Højlund drop to the bench, while the injured Ayden Heaven misses out altogether. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton predicts who will win tonight - Nottingham Forest or Manchester United
I thought Brandon Williams was Man United's future despite warnings from inside Carrington. Now, he faces jail and a ruined career but it could have been so different, writes IAN HERBERT
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: I watched Brandon Williams look like Manchester United's future left back of choice in a 2-0 win at Burnley, five years ago. Spatial awareness, box-to-box running - he had so much.

arts.ttl: Premier League to finally use new offside technology THIS season as start date revealed
arts.sum: The Premier League will follow in both UEFA and FIFA's footsteps and use semi-automated offsides for the final part of the 2024-25 season, it's been confirmed
